title: lathyrus luteus subsp. occidentalis
intro: Lathyrus luteus subsp. occidentalis, also known as the western yellow pea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus luteus subsp. occidentalis include reducing blood pressure, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting kidney function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in some traditional remedies for its purported health benefits.
